name: video-to-doc
title: Sytex Video Docs
description: Generate Sytex process documentation from screen recordings with cropped screenshots, Markdown output, and DOCX export using a corporate template.
setup_instructions: Requires Python 3 and Pandoc available in PATH.

install.linux: sudo apt-get install -y python3 || sudo yum install -y python3
sudo apt-get install -y pandoc || sudo yum install -y pandoc
